name: io.github.MendleM/pipepost
description: Open-source MCP server to publish to Dev.to, Ghost, Hashnode, WordPress, Medium, LinkedIn, X, Bluesky, and Mastodon from Claude Code. Local stdio, no cloud relay. Includes SEO scoring, JSON-LD schema, canonical-URL wiring, social-post generation, Unsplash covers, and IndexNow.
